repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
names_tesim: Written, and dated, by a scribe named Iovane
full_text_tesim: All quires are quaternions, except quires 1 and 8; quire 8 consists only of f. 61 | Quire signatures at the beginning of most quires | Quires are tightly stitched | Relations within the quires are difficult to establish | Only quires 1, 7, and 8 are palimpsested
Foliation in pencil at the center or top of outer margin
Unbound codex, incomplete at beginning and end | Tightly stitched quires | Most folios are stitched together from several pieces
Warped back, with parchment reinforcements (with writing in CPA)
Written, and dated, by a scribe named Iovane
